title: Opinion on the opinion of Evangelion
display_title: Opinion on the opinion of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Opinion on the opinion of Evangelion             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 12:54 pm Everyone has opinions on Evangelion. Each one is different. Shinji loves Rei, Shinji loves Asuka, Rei was Lilith, Rei wasn't Lilith. Whos right? Anno later stated: "Evangelion is like a puzzle, you know. Any person can see it and give his/her own answer. In other words, we're offering viewers to think by themselves, so that each person can imagine his/her own world. We will never offer the answers, even in the theatrical version. As for many Evangelion viewers, they may expect us to provide the 'all-about Eva' manuals, but there is no such thing. Don't expect to get answers by someone. Don't expect to be catered to all the time. We all have to find our own answers." - Anno Hideaki - PA #43, translated by Miyako Graham from 11/96 Newtype His statement meant that No one would ever get it right, Its up to you to figure out your own ansewers, and Anno put different things into Eva. Considering this does this mean that Evangelion is open-ended?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 03, 2006 1:09 pm There are things in NGE that aren't explicitly stated, but can be unambiguously worked out from the material given (who is in EVA-00); and there are some that don't have enough material to support anything other than a wild-ass guess (most anything to do with the Lance).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 03, 2006 1:20 pm I think Anno's statement is more in keeping with personal aspects: "What does the show mean to you?"; as opposed to what I would view as pointless speculation over minutia. Therein lies my opinion on Evangelion which has been stated over and over again. Don't get caught up in "Who killed Kaji?" and "Why is Ritsuko naked when talking to Seele?", there are more important personal questions about yourself and your relationship to the characters to be made.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 2:50 pm Are your statements from what Anno has said or your own personal theorys? I don't think Anno would state things unexplicitly unless he gave people a choice to ansewer the questions themselves. I think Anno put different ideas into the anime (Shinji's choice for love: Rei or Asuka, Rei being Lilith) and let people choose what was truth. Also I think he allowed all questions ,he put into the anime, to be ansewered. Every ansewer he put can be ansewered by choice and research. Another piece of evidence to show this is how some things contradict eachother. For example, Shinji saying that he feels for Rei and his mother the same way and yet has sexual urges for Rei. No where in the series does Shinji seem to show sexual urges for his ma. Meaning he at least feels a little different for Rei than his ma. I agree slightly on Eva Monkey thinking that Anno's statement shows 'what the show may mean to you.' However, with Anno saying how 'people are allowed to create their world' says to mean that Anno allowed certain questions (Shinji's love for Rei or Asuka) for us to ansewer. I just hope there is a way for Shinji to be with Rei and that I'm not on a wild goose-chase.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 03, 2006 3:07 pm The Goose wrote: I just hope there is a way for Shinji to be with Rei and that I'm not on a wild goose-chase.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 3:09 pm What do you think of my post to your and Eva Monkey's original posts? As for A/S, I believe it and R/S can happen. I'm just a person who feels that R/S can happn. Thats who I am and I can't change it. I'd also like to say that Anno never said that Shinji loved Rei or Asuka. And on those questions and character's words, perhaps, can be opinion-natd.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sun Dec 03, 2006 3:39 pm Shipping? In MY Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:08 pm Eva ship wars have been here since the dawn of everything. I'm an R/S fan myself, but I don't dwell on things like that.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:09 pm shipping?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:09 pm Relationships

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:09 pm There is ambiguity, and then there is sloppy writing. Which does Evangelion have more of, I wonder?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:10 pm I'm not taling about relationships. Do you think that Eva is opinion-nated? That the viewer is allowed to choose the ansewers to things. The relationship thing is, what I believe, one of the choices we have. Considering that people are thorn between choices and Anno hasn't stated any ansewers to us, I think so.

[]: Re: Opinion on the opinion of Evangelion             Quote Post by directedition » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:22 pm The Goose wrote: "Evangelion is like a puzzle, you know. Any person can see it and give his/her own answer."

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:25 pm I guess the big question here is just what things are you talking about?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:34 pm Rei being Lilith Shinji's choice of Rei or Asuka Humanity coming back from the LCL Rei coming back from the Sea of LCL Unit 00's soul and maybe some others

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:48 pm I don't think Rei can come back. She wasn't a part of the vat of souls, and she kinda got rippped to shreds in the atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 03, 2006 4:49 pm The Goose wrote: Rei being Lilith Shinji's choice of Rei or Asuka Humanity coming back from the LCL Rei coming back from the Sea of LCL Unit 00's soul and maybe some others

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 03, 2006 5:36 pm The Goose wrote: shipping?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Dec 03, 2006 5:38 pm To each his own. If Rei was Lilith, then there was no Rei. She wasn't special at all. If Rei was Lilith, then she would have never loved Shinji to start 3I and show him to reject it. Plus it seems weird that when Gendo will use her, she will die. I think she would survive if Gendo was supposed to use her in 3I. Shinji may have ended up with Asuka, but it doesn't mean that he loves her. Actually after the title 'I Need You' Rei appears before him. And then he strangles Asuka. To me Rei appeared to Shinji to show that she would return, but would have to hope for now. Shinji isn't able to do this and strangles Asuka for forsaking him. Asuka finally comforts him and caresses his face. Shinji (his ma doing this to him before) breaks down because he tried to kill Asuka and that he broke his promise to his ma to be strong. Asuka says her famous line to show this. Humanity can come back because Rei and Yui said so. Though its up to the viewer to decide. And conisdering that no one says that Rei can't come back, she could too. Though if she was Lilith, then this would seem impossible. However, Gendo didn't really need Lilith's soul to control 3I. Lilith was implaped on the cross and ,for some reason, the Lance is stabbed inside her. Also if you look in "EOE" Lilith's body seems to change from a lump of dough to a more femine form. This is before Rei joins her. Also if the angels joined with Lilith, then they couldn't do 3I without her soul. Plus if the Angels joined and became one with Lilith, the angel inside her would choose what the fate of the world would be. The fate of people outside Lilith would match the angel inside Lilith. All Gendo needed to do was make an angel to allow him to connect to Lilith, so he could create his own 3I. I haven't a clue to whose soul is in Unit 00, Ritsuko's mom has her brain in the Magi making it seem that it isn't hers. However, Asuka's mom's soul is inside Unit 03 and her brain and body is outside the Eva. This is different from Yui who was sucked into Unit 01. So I believe that Ritsuko's mom is in Unit 00 or nothing at all. More or less, its up to you. neither of us is right or wrong. And from what you say how that movie suddenly ends allows the viewer to choose if Rei and humanity came back.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Dec 03, 2006 6:07 pm The Goose wrote: If Rei was Lilith, then there was no Rei. She wasn't special at all.
